tasks.title: Implement devdive init CLI workflow
tasks.description: Add scanning, planner call, optional repo creation, GitHub issue creation, devdive.json write, and dashboard launch in the init command.
tasks.design_notes: Structure init as a sequential pipeline with each step returning a context object; abort on failure and rollback partial changes.

tasks.title: Build planner agent to call HF LLM
tasks.description: Create internal/agent/planner.go that sends codebase summary to the HuggingFace inference endpoint, parses JSON task list, and validates required fields.
tasks.design_notes: Define a Planner interface and inject an HTTP client to enable unit testing with a mock response.

tasks.title: Add GitHub integration for repo & issue management
tasks.description: Implement repository creation, issue creation with labels, and devdive.json version commits via the Contents API.
tasks.design_notes: Encapsulate GitHub calls in a service layer that retries transient errors and logs request IDs for traceability.

tasks.title: Create file and git watchers with broadcast
tasks.description: Use fsnotify to watch devdive.json and other project files, and a git poller to detect new commits, then push updates to the WebSocket hub.
tasks.design_notes: Run watchers in separate goroutines coordinated via a shared context and protect state with a sync.RWMutex.

tasks.title: Implement commit analysis LLM agent
tasks.description: Send commit diffs to the LLM, parse returned task progress JSON, and update task status in devdive.json.
tasks.design_notes: Cache recent diffs to avoid re‑processing the same commit and debounce rapid pushes.

tasks.title: Add design review agent for architectural drift
tasks.description: Trigger after every 10 commits or on-demand, compare changed files against original design notes, and record drift findings in devdive.json.
tasks.design_notes: Store findings with severity levels and surface them via the WS so the dashboard can filter them.

tasks.title: Develop Go HTTP server with embedded dashboard
tasks.description: Set up net/http server, Gorilla WebSocket hub, and embed the Vite build output via go:embed, serving it at localhost:7777.
tasks.design_notes: Initialize the server with graceful shutdown handling and inject the state manager for real‑time broadcasts.

tasks.title: Build Preact dashboard UI components
tasks.description: Create pages for issues, CI status, nudges, commit log, and design reviews; connect to WebSocket context for live updates.
tasks.design_notes: Leverage preact-iso routing and a central WS provider to avoid duplicated listeners across components.
